message:
fix: degrade to 'unknown' agent slug in FTS rebuild for NULL agent_id

The conversations.agent_id column is nullable, so the correlated subquery
(SELECT a.slug FROM agents a WHERE a.id = c.agent_id) returns NULL when
agent_id is NULL or references a non-existent agent.

The original 3-table INNER JOIN silently dropped such rows entirely.  My
initial 860acb12 FTS fix preserved that drop implicitly by letting the
subquery return NULL — but the FTS table has no NOT NULL constraint, so
NULL slugs would have been indexed as empty strings.  Worse, this diverges
from the Tantivy rebuild path (8a0c547c), which explicitly degrades NULL
agent_id to the sentinel string 'unknown'.

Wrap the agent subquery in COALESCE(..., 'unknown') in all three FTS
rebuild queries to keep agent-slug handling consistent across the two
rebuild paths.  workspace_id stays as-is since NULL workspace is a valid
and meaningful value (the Tantivy path handles it the same way).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -6186,7 +6186,7 @@ impl FrankenStorage {
             .execute_compat(
                 "INSERT INTO fts_messages(rowid, content, title, agent, workspace, source_path, created_at)
                  SELECT m.id, m.content, c.title,
-                        (SELECT a.slug FROM agents a WHERE a.id = c.agent_id),
+                        COALESCE((SELECT a.slug FROM agents a WHERE a.id = c.agent_id), 'unknown'),
                         (SELECT w.path FROM workspaces w WHERE w.id = c.workspace_id),
                         c.source_path, m.created_at
                  FROM messages m
@@ -6249,7 +6249,7 @@ impl FrankenStorage {
                     .execute_compat(
                         "INSERT INTO fts_messages(rowid, content, title, agent, workspace, source_path, created_at)
                          SELECT m.id, m.content, c.title,
-                                (SELECT a.slug FROM agents a WHERE a.id = c.agent_id),
+                                COALESCE((SELECT a.slug FROM agents a WHERE a.id = c.agent_id), 'unknown'),
                                 (SELECT w.path FROM workspaces w WHERE w.id = c.workspace_id),
                                 c.source_path, m.created_at
                          FROM messages m
@@ -6270,7 +6270,7 @@ impl FrankenStorage {
                     .execute_compat(
                         "INSERT INTO fts_messages(rowid, content, title, agent, workspace, source_path, created_at)
                          SELECT m.id, m.content, c.title,
-                                (SELECT a.slug FROM agents a WHERE a.id = c.agent_id),
+                                COALESCE((SELECT a.slug FROM agents a WHERE a.id = c.agent_id), 'unknown'),
                                 (SELECT w.path FROM workspaces w WHERE w.id = c.workspace_id),
                                 c.source_path, m.created_at
                          FROM messages m
